title: Code for the paper "ERH regulates type II interferon immune signaling through post-transcriptional regulation of JAK2 mRNA"
author: Soderholm, Adrian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Code for the paper "ERH regulates type II interferon immune signaling through post-transcriptional regulation of JAK2 mRNA" 
 The scripts provided were used for data exploration and analysis in the associated manuscript published in  Nucleic Acids Research .  They are not optimized for reuse and may require adaptation for other datasets or environments. 
 Associated repositories: 
 
 Article: https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gkaf545 
 GEO: GSE274069, GSE274070, GSE274071, and GSE274074 
 PRIDE: PXD055858 
 Zenodo: 10.5281/zenodo.15229803 
 
 Description 
 
 The `DEseq2...R` and `DEseq2...Rmd` scripts were used for differential RNA-seq analysis. 
 The `Data_Exploration_Analysis.R` script is a unified and modified version of all scripts used for downstream data exploration and analysis. 
 The `Plotting.R` script is a unified and modified version of all scripts used for plotting. 
 The `_Data` folder contains input files used for `Data_Exploration_Analysis.R` as well as intermediary and final files for `Plotting.R`.  
 Except for `dir_ontology`, which should be set to the `dir_ontology` folder, all other `path/to/` directories can be set relative to the `_Data` folder. 
 
 Dependencies 
 
 R programming language 
 
 Authors 
 
 Adrian Soderholm https://www.linkedin.com/in/adrsod/ 
 Niko Popitsch https://www.linkedin.com/in/niko-popitsch-379b0942/ 
 Pablo Araguas Rodriguez pa520@cam.ac.uk
